hero.subtitle: The professional platform connecting committed candidates with serious employers in the private snow sector — hotels, ski schools, rental shops and resort offices across the Alps & Pyrenees.

trust.title: Serious people looking for work. Serious companies hiring.
trust.subtitle: Nevajobs is not a generic job board. Professionals come here to work for real, and sector employers who hire with intent.
trust.candidatesDesc: Complete profiles, verifiable languages and honest availability. For people committed to a full season — not just browsing.
trust.companiesDesc: Hotels, private ski schools, shops and offices posting real roles and looking for reliable workers for the full season.

stats.activeJobs: Active jobs in the Alps & Pyrenees

jobs.title: Latest opportunities
jobs.subtitle: Real roles from serious employers at Europe's top ski destinations
jobs.emptyTitle: No active jobs match your search.
jobs.emptySubtitle: Check back soon — new roles are posted daily.

candidates.title: Available candidates now
candidates.subtitle: Employer feed — mid-season drop-outs and talent already in resort, ready to start immediately.
candidates.emptyTitle: No candidates with immediate availability right now.
candidates.emptySubtitle: Candidates who enable the emergency switch appear here automatically.

voice.title: Voice Intro ({seconds}s)
voice.subtitle: Language passport · verify fluency before contact

pricing.title: No-excuses pricing for employers
pricing.subtitle: No excuse not to hire: €5 per candidate, plans from €39/month. Candidates always free.
pricing.seasonNote: Winter season Nov–Mar · Summer free for employers · Cancel anytime
pricing.footnote: €5 to save your weekend · Plans cheaper than dinner out · Secure Stripe payments

launchPromo.title: November launch: first month Pro 100% FREE
launchPromo.body: Unlimited CVs and Emergency Radar free in November. Lose a waiter over the December bridge → replacement in 2 hours.

credits.title: Single credits — try before you subscribe
credits.description: €5 to unlock a candidate's data, PDF and voice intro. Pocket change to save your weekend. No subscription.

free.name: Free
free.description: Post jobs and see candidate previews (languages, certification, basic experience).

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Less than dinner out. Station bars, rental shops — subscribe just in case.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Under €80/month — all-you-can-eat CVs across Europe. Mid-size hotels & restaurants.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: International hotel chains, luxury resorts and mega ski schools.

footer.copyright: © {year} Nevajobs — Professional seasonal jobs in the private snow sector

pwa.title: Install Nevajobs
pwa.androidHint: Add to your home screen for quick access to winter jobs.
pwa.iosHint: Install this app on your iPhone: tap Share, then "Add to Home Screen".
